title: Toasted Smoky Korean Rice Bowl
description: A solo dinner dish featuring crispy rice and smoky flavors, served in an earthenware bowl, Whole30 friendly and inspired by Busan cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together cauliflower rice, coconut oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Spread the mixture on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
While the rice is toasting, melt 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped green onions to the skillet and cook until softened, about 2 minutes.
In a separate bowl, crush the Rice Krispies into smaller pieces.
Once the cauliflower rice is toasted, mix in the crushed Rice Krispies and cooked green onions.
Serve the toasted smoky Korean rice bowl in an earthenware bowl.
Garnish with additional green onions if desired.
